task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into OSCAR EMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OSCAR EMR main dashboard, schedule screen, or search interface is visible in a web browser, indicating the credentials (oscardoc) were accepted.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent searched for the correct patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search screen or results list showing the patient 'Robert Williams' with DOB '1942-07-18'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the patient record or eChart for Robert Williams.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient demographic or eChart screen is open, clearly displaying the name 'Robert Williams' at the top or in the patient details.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the chart alert section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box, text area, or specific section designated for 'Alerts', 'Chart Alerts', or 'Ticklers' is open within the patient's record.

task_completion.description: Verify the exact alert text was entered for the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Patient is hard of hearing - please speak slowly and loudly. Contact daughter Maria at 905-555-0173 for any communication issues.' is visible in the patient's alert section, text box, or displayed as an active alert on the chart.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the OSCAR EMR web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions should take place within a web browser showing the OSCAR EMR interface, not via terminal commands, curl, or scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use a text editor or mock page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The alert text must be entered into the actual OSCAR EMR application fields, not a notepad, text editor, or unrelated web page.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use direct database manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL or database insertion commands should be visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Robert Williams, DOB: 1942-07-18. Expected Alert Text: 'Patient is hard of hearing - please speak slowly and loudly. Contact daughter Maria at 905-555-0173 for any communication issues.' Key phrases to verify in the alert: 'hard of hearing', 'speak slowly', '905-555-0173', 'Maria'. Credentials: oscardoc / oscar / PIN 1117.
